programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: A murder investigation gets reignited in a house that's considered haunted by the Lawrenceton locals, and where years earlier, Aurora and Sally discovered a body as teenagers.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hannah Swensen Mysteries
programme.sub-title: A Sprinkle of Deceit: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah and Chad flirt with their own paths to solve the same murder while working to clear a colleague who is implicated in the crime; Delores gets her big break.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Seth Hazlitt's benefit concert to save the woods near Cabot Cove is endangered when the lead singer is permanently silenced.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: The Dark Side of the Door
programme.desc: Details in a manuscript convince a young editor (Tracy Middendorf) that the author (Richard Beymer) kidnapped her 11 years earlier, but when the author is found dead, the editor becomes the primary suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: When the producer of a hit twenty-something series is murdered, Jessica does some directing of her own.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After Jessica's story for children becomes a television puppet show; she must find the fiend who used one of the puppets as a murder weapon.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A vacation in the Grand Tetons turns into work when the man threatening Jessica's host with blackmail is murdered.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica has to solve two murders to clear the name of her old friend Deputy Andy Broom (Louis Herthum), who becomes a suspect when a murder weapon is found in his car.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Australia to prove that she is the rightful heir to 130,000 acres of grazing land, but her arrival results in two murders.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when a wealthy yachtsman is murdered two days before a big race, and his rival's daughter is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Mark is nearly killed by a bomb, Steve's protege goes under cover to learn the terrorists' next target.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and the others discover that a bus accident victim was actually murdered and that several of the passengers had motives to kill him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a political cover-up when the drug-addicted daughter of a prominent politician dies of an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates the murder of a high-school teacher when a lawyer from the district attorney's office insists the death was a case of gang violence.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington's complex case involves a body, a boxer, an abandoned baby and an underworld boss.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A dying tycoon engages Remington and Laura to find his adopted daughter's (Ann Dusenberry) twin sister; guest Joanna Barnes.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura poses as a model and Remington as a seedy wholesale buyer as part of their investigation of fashion-industry espionage.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When the judge presiding over Ben's latest case is found murdered, Ben is accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When the judge presiding over Ben's latest case is found murdered, Ben is accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A madam (Maureen Arthur) is accused of killing a former employee who was blackmailing famous clients.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A roofing contractor (George DiCenzo) is charged with murdering his wife's philandering personal-fitness trainer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A narcotics officer (Titus Welliver) faces charges of murdering a fellow cop to cover up department corruption.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry's medieval feast at Hyde Castle gets interrupted by a murder. She teams up with Detective Schultz to solve the mystery before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Vows We Have Made
programme.desc: As Shane and Oliver prepare to wed, the team helps an unwell boy reunite with a lost friend. A new employee may deliver the answer for Rita and Norman to start a family.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: What You Don't Know Can Kill You
programme.desc: Seth's niece returns to Cabot Cove for her wedding only to have her groom die accidentally before the event.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While Jessica is in Atlanta to address mystery writers, a lethal virus is stolen from the Biological Research Institute.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: After a San Francisco radio station changes its music format from classical to rock, the promoter who engineered the switch dies and Jessica searches for the killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Newly successful mystery writer J.B. Fletcher gets involved in a murder at a New York publisher's costume bash.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: With her first hit mystery, Maine widow Jessica Fletcher makes a promotional trip to New York, and becomes involved in a murder at a publisher's costume bash.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A financier (Howard Duff), reportedly swept overboard during a hurricane, turns up in Jessica's yard disguised as a handyman.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to San Francisco for a family wedding and discovers that the groom (Jeff Conaway) faces a murder charge.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is suspected of a producer's murder after people hear her threatening to stop the victim from filming her new novel.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Soon after Mark's estranged daughter returns home, the Sloans receive word her husband has been murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan must disprove the charges against a nurse when her former employer, a Malibu madam, is found murdered just prior to the release of her tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Skeletal remains found during a ground-breaking ceremony are those of Mark's former mentor, who disappeared 30 years before.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and private investigator Joe Mannix reopen a 25-year-old murder case in which the mob is suspected of killing an investigative reporter.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: After being chosen as one of a magazine's five most eligible men, Steele feels threatened when two fellow honorees are slain.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington pose as trapeze-artist and fire-eater to investigate an old murder; guest A Martinez.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: A mobster testifying for the government grabs Mildred, forcing Remington and Laura to guard his children on a drive to Phoenix.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a gambling blues singer (Ron Taylor) accused of killing his bookmaker.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben uncovers information about a 15-year-old unsolved killing during his defense of a gambler accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon is charged with the murder of his partner, but evidence later shows the doctor's twin brother may be the culprit.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Conrad and his fashion-model girlfriend ask Ben to defend a photographer who is accused of murdering a modeling agent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A movie star's former bodyguard, now a rebellious biker, is the primary suspect in the actor's murder.

programme.title: Jazz Ramsey: A K-9 Mystery
programme.desc: When Jazz Ramsey and her crime detection dog Zeus stumble upon an old crime scene, the K9 trainer, her star pup, and ex-boyfriend and lead detective Nick get into the investigation.

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry caters a VIP concert and goes on a date with Tom.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica delves into two investigations when both her wealthy Southern cousin and his daughter die mysteriously.
